reviews.text: I went with my mum who’s suffering from menopause at the moment. At our first visit everything was great we felt welcome and listened to. However, on our second time being there we were dealt with complete rudeness and paid consultation fee …

Dr is proficient and experienced in his treatment but any post-service follow ups were negligible. Its been a a few weeks post my request for a breakdown of my medicine invoice to support an insurance claim and have gotten zero support.
I have been suffering from pelvic pain for a long time. So, instead of waiting for NHS appointment I had decided to visit this clinic. …

unprofessional. I will never visit this practice again. It has been two weeks of calling to remind them that I still didn't recieve my invoice. It's just an invoice. An invoice! How can I trust them with my treatments or results if they can't even send an invoice.

Dot go to this clinic. It's scam. Rude people, they just want to trick you. On the phone they say one thing and when I arrived its completely different. Maked me to spend lot of money and in the end they didn't solve nothing, they send me …

First we was happy when we went there to find out that i have or not ovary cyst which i wasnt i have been told everything ok i have no problem.. At second time he said pay money i'll do utrasound i told him that i have no more money then he …

It’s unclear how they have 4.6 stars. I would have received faster results from the NHS. I don’t understand how they can charge money for service and waiting times that are significantly worse than the NHS.
It's so expensive. It cost me almost 500£ for 1 examination. They just want to take your money

I visited this clinic and was shocked, to put it mildly. The nurse, a Russian-speaking one at that, was not only rude but also very judgmental. I paid £700 for a blood test and a couple of packs of pills that they gave me on the spot. I think that's too much. I highly, highly recommend it!
We are very sorry  to see negativity without comment , yet also unknown person.
We do not have patient with that name , fake review
